required_skills: Game development using Unity or Unreal Engine at a production-ready level
Proficiency in C# (for Unity) or C++ (for Unreal Engine) for game logic and systems programming
Game design principles including core loop design, player progression, and reward systems
2D and 3D asset integration including sprites, meshes, materials, and animations within a game engine
Physics simulation and collision detection implementation within game engines
Debugging, profiling, and performance optimization for games across target platforms (PC, console, mobile)
Version control and collaborative development using Git in a multi-developer game project environment
Understanding of game architecture patterns including Entity-Component-System (ECS) and event-driven systems
preferred_skills: Shader programming and visual effects development using HLSL, GLSL, or Unreal Material Editor
Multiplayer and networking systems development including client-server architecture and peer-to-peer for real-time games
Mobile game optimization for iOS and Android including memory management, battery efficiency, and touch input handling
In-app purchase systems, ad monetization SDKs, and LiveOps feature integration for mobile and free-to-play games
Procedural content generation techniques for levels, terrain, or item generation
AI behavior systems for NPC design including finite state machines (FSM) and behavior trees
Experience shipping at least one title on Steam, App Store, Google Play, or console platforms
responsibilities: Design and implement core gameplay systems including player controllers, camera rigs, inventory systems, and game state management in Unity or Unreal Engine
Integrate 2D and 3D art assets, animations, and audio into the game engine, ensuring visual fidelity and technical compliance with platform requirements
Collaborate with game designers, artists, and narrative writers to translate game design documents (GDDs) into functional, playable game features
Profile and optimize game performance across target platforms, resolving frame rate issues, memory leaks, and draw call bottlenecks
Implement physics-based interactions, collision systems, and ragdoll dynamics that contribute to believable and responsive gameplay feel
Develop NPC AI behaviors using finite state machines, behavior trees, or navigation mesh pathfinding to create compelling enemy and companion systems
Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code following established game development coding standards and design patterns
Participate in playtesting sessions, analyze player feedback, and iterate on gameplay mechanics to improve player experience and retention metrics
Manage build pipelines and deployment workflows for PC, mobile, or console platforms ensuring compliance with platform certification requirements
Coordinate with QA teams to reproduce, diagnose, and fix bugs across gameplay, UI, and platform-specific systems within sprint timelines
